CustomField.description: How to match fields for masking: EXACT_FIELD (specific field API name - requires FieldApiName__c), REGEX_PATTERN (regex on field value - requires MatchPattern__c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: EXACT_FIELD: masks a specific field (set SObject Type + Field API Name). REGEX_PATTERN: masks any field whose VALUE matches the regex pattern (set Match Pattern).
CustomField.label: Match Type
